name: weakness_profile
description: Generate a WeaknessProfile for a student by aggregating mastery state data. PERIODIC tier analyzes current semester, GLOBAL tier analyzes full history. Returns structured weakness data without writing to database.

tier.description: Analysis scope: PERIODIC (current semester) or GLOBAL (full history)

semesterStartDate.description: ISO date string for semester start boundary (required for PERIODIC tier, ignored for GLOBAL)
